introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu ku barayaa tirooyinka 0 ilaa 100, da’da, lambarrada telefoonka, cinwaannada, qiimaha, taariikhaha iyo buuxinta foomamka xogta qofka adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar qorista iyo dhawaaqa zero ilaa twenty, iyo farqiga hordhaca ah ee -teen iyo -ty.
learningObjectives: Akhri oo qor 0 ilaa 20.
Tirso si sax ah zero ilaa twenty.
Kala saar thirteen/thirty iyo lammaanayaasha la midka ah.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: zero waa sida tirada 0 loogu qoro English.
one waa sida tirada 1 loogu qoro English.
two waa sida tirada 2 loogu qoro English.
three waa sida tirada 3 loogu qoro English.
four waa sida tirada 4 loogu qoro English.
five waa sida tirada 5 loogu qoro English.
six waa sida tirada 6 loogu qoro English.
seven waa sida tirada 7 loogu qoro English.
eight waa sida tirada 8 loogu qoro English.
nine waa sida tirada 9 loogu qoro English.
ten waa sida tirada 10 loogu qoro English.
eleven waa sida tirada 11 loogu qoro English.
twelve waa sida tirada 12 loogu qoro English.
thirteen waa sida tirada 13 loogu qoro English.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Thirteen waa 13; thirty waa 30. Dhawaaqa -teen dheer u sheeg.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: fourteen waa sida tirada 14 loogu qoro English.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Fourteen waa 14; forty waa 40. Forty laguma qoro fourty.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: fifteen waa sida tirada 15 loogu qoro English.
sixteen waa sida tirada 16 loogu qoro English.
seventeen waa sida tirada 17 loogu qoro English.
eighteen waa sida tirada 18 loogu qoro English.
nineteen waa sida tirada 19 loogu qoro English.
twenty waa sida tirada 20 loogu qoro English.

examples.somali: Waxaa jira saddex iyo toban arday.

lines.speaker: Asha
lines.somali: Saddex iyo toban, ma aha soddon?

lines.speaker: Student
lines.english: Zero, one, two, three, four, five.
lines.somali: Eber, kow, laba, saddex, afar, shan.

practiceExercises.question: “zero” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa 0; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: There are ___ students. (13)
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “thirteen” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “one” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: one waxaa loola jeedaa 1.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: books / have / two / I
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “I have two books.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I have two books.
options: Waxaa jira saddex iyo toban arday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaa jira saddex iyo toban arday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “There are thirteen students.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa ah 18?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “eighteen” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Tirso 0 ilaa 20, kadib si cad u kala sheeg thirteen/thirty, fourteen/forty, fifteen/fifty iyo eighteen/eighty.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Tirooyinka 0 ilaa 20 ku qor English, kadib qor afar lammaane oo -teen iyo -ty ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Tirso 0 ilaa 20, kadib si cad u kala sheeg thirteen/thirty, fourteen/forty, fifteen/fifty iyo eighteen/eighty.
lessons.writingPractice: Tirooyinka 0 ilaa 20 ku qor English, kadib qor afar lammaane oo -teen iyo -ty ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay zero ilaa twenty. -teen wuxuu tilmaamaa 13–19; -ty wuxuu yimaadaa tobannada sida thirty iyo forty.

quizQuestions.question: “zero” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa 0; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: There are ___ students. (13)
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “thirteen” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “one” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: one waxaa loola jeedaa 1.

lessons.titleSomali: Tirooyinka kow iyo labaatan ilaa boqol
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar tobannada, tirooyinka isku dhafan iyo hyphen-ka twenty-one ilaa ninety-nine.
learningObjectives: Akhri tirooyinka 21 ilaa 100.
Samee tiro isku dhafan tens + ones.
Hyphen si sax ah ugu qor tirooyinka isku dhafan.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: twenty waa sida tirada 20 loogu qoro English.
thirty waa sida tirada 30 loogu qoro English.
forty waa sida tirada 40 loogu qoro English.
fifty waa sida tirada 50 loogu qoro English.
sixty waa sida tirada 60 loogu qoro English.
seventy waa sida tirada 70 loogu qoro English.
eighty waa sida tirada 80 loogu qoro English.
ninety waa sida tirada 90 loogu qoro English.
one hundred waa sida tirada 100 loogu qoro English.
twenty-four waa sida tirada 24 loogu qoro English.
thirty-five waa sida tirada 35 loogu qoro English.
forty-eight waa sida tirada 48 loogu qoro English.
fifty-seven waa sida tirada 57 loogu qoro English.
sixty-nine waa sida tirada 69 loogu qoro English.
seventy-three waa sida tirada 73 loogu qoro English.
eighty-six waa sida tirada 86 loogu qoro English.
ninety-nine waa sida tirada 99 loogu qoro English.

examples.somali: Qiimuhu waa afar iyo labaatan doolar.
Waxaa jira shan iyo soddon kursi.
Bogga siddeed iyo afartan waa furan yahay.
Wuxuu jiraa saddex iyo toddobaatan sano.

practiceExercises.question: “twenty” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa 20; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: The number 48 is ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “forty-eight” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “thirty” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: thirty waxaa loola jeedaa 30.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: is / ninety-nine / number / The
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “The number is ninety-nine.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: The price is twenty-four dollars.
options: Bogga siddeed iyo afartan waa furan yahay.
Waxaa jira shan iyo soddon kursi.
Wuxuu jiraa saddex iyo toddobaatan sano.
Qiimuhu waa afar iyo labaatan doolar.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Qiimuhu waa afar iyo labaatan doolar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaa jira shan iyo soddon kursi.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “There are thirty-five chairs.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa si sax ah loo qoray 40?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “forty” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Akhri tirooyinkan: 24, 35, 48, 57, 69, 73, 86, 99 iyo 100.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Tirooyinka 21, 34, 46, 58, 67, 79, 82, 95 iyo 100 ku qor English adigoo hyphen isticmaalaya.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.writingPractice: Tirooyinka 21, 34, 46, 58, 67, 79, 82, 95 iyo 100 ku qor English adigoo hyphen isticmaalaya.
lessons.summarySomali: Tirooyinka isku dhafan waxay ka kooban yihiin tens iyo ones: twenty-four. 40 waxaa loo qoraa forty, 100-na one hundred.

quizQuestions.question: “twenty” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa 20; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: The number 48 is ___.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “forty-eight” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “thirty” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: thirty waxaa loola jeedaa 30.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar How old…? iyo sida am, is, are loogu isticmaalo da’da.
learningObjectives: Da’da qof weydii.
Da’ tusaale ah ku sheeg I am… years old.
Am, is iyo are ku waafaji subject-ka.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu weydiiyaa da’da qofka.
Waxaa tirada kadib lagu caddeeyaa da’da.
Da’daada waxaa lagu sheegaa I am, ma aha I have.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha oran I have twenty years.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: He waxaa la socda is.
She waxaa la socda is.
Age waa tirada sannadaha qofku jiro.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Wuxuu jiraa shan iyo toban sano.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Old halkan wuxuu qayb ka yahay qaabka sheegidda da’da.

grammar.titleEnglish: How old with am, is, are
grammar.titleSomali: How old iyo am, is, are
grammar.explanationSomali: Da’da waxaa English-ka lagu sheegaa verb to be: I am, he/she is, you are.
grammar.rule: I am; he/she is; you are

positiveExamples.somali: Wuxuu jiraa shan iyo toban sano.

questionExamples.somali: Wuxuu jiraa shan iyo toban sano.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran I have twenty years.
Ha oran How old you are? su’aal toos ah.

examples.somali: Wuxuu jiraa shan iyo toban sano.

practiceExercises.question: “How old are you?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Immisa jir baad tahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: I ___ twenty years old.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “am” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Years old” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Years old waxaa loola jeedaa Jir/sano da’ ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: old / are / How / you
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “How old are you?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I am twenty years old.
options: Wuxuu jiraa shan iyo toban sano.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaan jiraa labaatan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I’m twenty.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa ah qaabka saxda ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “I am twenty years old.” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Isticmaal da’ tusaale ah: weydii How old are you? kadib ku jawaab I am … years old.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Qor da’da saddex qof oo tusaale ah adigoo isticmaalaya I am, he is iyo she is.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Isticmaal da’ tusaale ah: weydii How old are you? kadib ku jawaab I am … years old.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor da’da saddex qof oo tusaale ah adigoo isticmaalaya I am, he is iyo she is.
lessons.summarySomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa I am twenty years old. How old are you? iyo How old is he/she? ayaa da’da lagu weydiiyaa.

quizQuestions.question: “How old are you?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Immisa jir baad tahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: I ___ twenty years old.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “am” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Years old” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Years old waxaa loola jeedaa Jir/sano da’ ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar codsiga, ku celinta iyo akhrinta lambar telefoon digit-digit adigoo adeegsanaya zero, oh iyo double.
learningObjectives: Lambar tusaale digit-digit u akhri.
Codso lambar telefoon.
Weydii in lambar lagu celiyo.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Lambar telefoon waa taxane digits ah; tusaalahan ma aha lambar qof dhab ah.
Waxaa lagu codsadaa lambarka telefoonka.
Waxaa la yiraahdaa marka lambar aan la maqal.
Waa codsi edeb leh oo ku celin ah.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Double zero wuxuu ka dhigan yahay 00.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Double waxaa lagu gaabiyaa laba digit oo isku mid ah.
Zero ayaa si rasmi ah loo akhriyaa 0.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: You can say oh for zero in a phone number.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Lambar telefoon waxaad zero u oran kartaa oh.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Oh waxaa lagu isticmaali karaa 0 marka lambar telefoon la akhrinayo.

examples.english: Zero six one, two three four.
examples.somali: Eber lix kow, laba saddex afar.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is your example phone number?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Double zero, zero, one two three…
lines.somali: Laba eber, eber, kow laba saddex…

practiceExercises.question: “Phone number” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Lambarka telefoonka; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: My phone ___ is 000 123 4567.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “number” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “What is your phone number?” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: What is your phone number? waxaa loola jeedaa Waa maxay lambarka telefoonkaagu?.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: number / phone / your / is / What
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “What is your phone number?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My phone number is 000 123 4567.
options: Eber lix kow, laba saddex afar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Eber lix kow, laba saddex afar.
options: Zero six one, two three four.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Zero six one, two three four.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Zero six one, two three four.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: “Double zero” waa tee?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “00” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Akhri lambarro tusaale ah digit-digit: 000 123 4567 iyo 061 000 0000. Ha isticmaalin lambar dhab ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Qor laba lambar telefoon oo male-awaal ah, kadib hoostooda ku qor sida digit-digit loogu akhriyo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Akhri lambarro tusaale ah digit-digit: 000 123 4567 iyo 061 000 0000. Ha isticmaalin lambar dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor laba lambar telefoon oo male-awaal ah, kadib hoostooda ku qor sida digit-digit loogu akhriyo.
lessons.summarySomali: Lambarrada telefoonka digit-digit ayaa loo akhriyaa. Zero waxaa mararka qaar loo dhihi karaa oh; double zero waa 00.

quizQuestions.question: “Phone number” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Lambarka telefoonka; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: My phone ___ is 000 123 4567.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “number” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “What is your phone number?” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: What is your phone number? waxaa loola jeedaa Waa maxay lambarka telefoonkaagu?.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida magaalo, degmo, waddo, guri, dhisme iyo dal loogu sheego cinwaan fudud.
learningObjectives: Weydii Where do you live?
Sheeg magaalo iyo dal.
In iyo on si sax ah ugu isticmaal cinwaan.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu weydiiyaa meesha qof degan yahay.
Address wuxuu tilmaamaa meesha lagu heli karo guri ama dhisme.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The shop is on Market Street.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Dukaanku wuxuu ku yaal Market Street.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Street waa jid magaalo.
On waxaa badanaa lala isticmaalaa magaca waddada.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Lambarka gurigaygu waa laba iyo toban.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: House waa guri la deggan yahay.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The office is in this building.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Building waa dhisme guryo ama xafiisyo leh.
In waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo.
District waa qayb ka mid ah magaalo ama gobol.
Country waa dal.
In waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo, degmo ama dal.
On waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaca waddo.

grammar.explanationSomali: In waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo, degmo iyo dal. On waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaca waddada.

positiveExamples.somali: Lambarka gurigaygu waa laba iyo toban.

questionExamples.somali: Lambarka gurigaygu waa laba iyo toban.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran in Peace Road; qaabka la bartay waa on Peace Road.
Ha gelin cinwaan dhab ah layliga.

examples.somali: Lambarka gurigaygu waa laba iyo toban.

practiceExercises.question: “Where do you live?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Xaggee baad degan tahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: I live ___ Somalia.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “in” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Address” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Address waxaa loola jeedaa Cinwaan.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: live / Where / you / do
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Where do you live?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I live in Mogadishu.
options: Lambarka gurigaygu waa laba iyo toban.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaan degganahay Degmada Hodan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I live in Hodan District.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Magaca waddo preposition kee la socda?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “on” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Isticmaal cinwaan male-awaal ah: sheeg magaalo, degmo, waddo iyo lambar guri.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Qor cinwaan tusaale ah oo leh city, district, road iyo house number; ha isticmaalin cinwaan dhab ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Isticmaal cinwaan male-awaal ah: sheeg magaalo, degmo, waddo iyo lambar guri.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor cinwaan tusaale ah oo leh city, district, road iyo house number; ha isticmaalin cinwaan dhab ah.
lessons.summarySomali: I live in… waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo, degmo ama dal. I live on… waxaa lala isticmaalaa waddo.

quizQuestions.question: “Where do you live?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Xaggee baad degan tahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: I live ___ Somalia.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “in” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Address” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Address waxaa loola jeedaa Cinwaan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida qiime loo weydiiyo loogana jawaabo dukaan, suuq, makhaayad ama gaadiid.
learningObjectives: Qiimaha shay weydii.
Qiime ku sheeg dollars ama cents.
Kala saar How much iyo How many hordhac ahaan.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: How much waxaa lagu weydiiyaa qiimaha.
Cost wuxuu weydiinayaa qiimaha shayga.
Price waa lacagta shay lagu iibiyo.
Costs waxaa lala isticmaalaa it.
Cheap wuxuu tilmaamaa qiime hoose.
Expensive wuxuu tilmaamaa qiime sare.
Dollar waa lacag; plural-ku waa dollars.
Boqol cents waxay la mid yihiin hal dollar.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Wadartu waa laba iyo toban doolar.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Total waa qiimaha dhammaan waxyaabaha la isku daray.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: How many books do you want?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: How many waxaa lagu weydiiyaa tirada shay la tirin karo; How much halkan qiime ayuu weydiinayaa.

grammar.explanationSomali: How much is this? wuxuu weydiiyaa qiimaha shay la tilmaamayo. How much does it cost? isla qiimaha ayuu weydiiyaa. How many wuxuu weydiiyaa tiro xabbo.
grammar.rule: How much + is + this?; How much + does + it + cost?

positiveExamples.somali: Buuggu wuxuu ku kacayaa toban doolar.
Wadartu waa laba iyo toban doolar.

questionExamples.somali: Buuggu wuxuu ku kacayaa toban doolar.
Wadartu waa laba iyo toban doolar.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran How many is this? marka qiime la weydiinayo.
It cost ten dollars waxaa A1 present simple sax ahaan loo yiraahdaa It costs ten dollars.

examples.somali: Buuggu wuxuu ku kacayaa toban doolar.
Wadartu waa laba iyo toban doolar.

practiceExercises.question: “How much is this?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Immisa ayuu kani yahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: How ___ is this?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “much” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “How much does it cost?” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: How much does it cost? waxaa loola jeedaa Immisa ayuu ku kacayaa?.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: cost / does / it / much / How
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “How much does it cost?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: How much is this?
options: Buuggu wuxuu ku kacayaa toban doolar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waa shan doolar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “It is five dollars.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Waxaad rabtaa qiimaha hal buug. Kee sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “How much is this?” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Samee xaalad dukaan: weydii qiimaha buug, cunto, gaadiid iyo shay kale oo tusaale ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Qor wada sheekeysi dukaan oo shan sadar ah, kuna dar price, cheap ama expensive iyo total.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee xaalad dukaan: weydii qiimaha buug, cunto, gaadiid iyo shay kale oo tusaale ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor wada sheekeysi dukaan oo shan sadar ah, kuna dar price, cheap ama expensive iyo total.
lessons.summarySomali: How much is this? iyo How much does it cost? labaduba qiime ayay weydiiyaan. How many wuxuu weydiiyaa tiro xabbo.

quizQuestions.question: “How much is this?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Immisa ayuu kani yahay?; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: How ___ is this?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “much” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “How much does it cost?” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: How much does it cost? waxaa loola jeedaa Immisa ayuu ku kacayaa?.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar day, month, year, 12-ka bilood iyo labada qaab ee taariikhda.
learningObjectives: Magacow 12-ka bilood.
Akhri taariikh fudud.
Taariikh tusaale ah ku qor laba qaab.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Date waa maalinta, bisha iyo sannadka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: My example date of birth is 5 July 2000.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Taariikhda dhalashada tusaalaha ahi waa 5 Luulyo 2000.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaad layliga ku isticmaali kartaa taariikh male-awaal ah.
Taariikhaha waxay isticmaalaan ordinal numbers sida first iyo fifth.
Sannadku wuxuu leeyahay 12 bilood.
Year waa sannad.
January waa magaca bisha 1 ee sannadka.
February waa magaca bisha 2 ee sannadka.
March waa magaca bisha 3 ee sannadka.
April waa magaca bisha 4 ee sannadka.
May waa magaca bisha 5 ee sannadka.
June waa magaca bisha 6 ee sannadka.
July waa magaca bisha 7 ee sannadka.
August waa magaca bisha 8 ee sannadka.
September waa magaca bisha 9 ee sannadka.
October waa magaca bisha 10 ee sannadka.
November waa magaca bisha 11 ee sannadka.
December waa magaca bisha 12 ee sannadka.
Ordinal number wuxuu muujinayaa kala horreyn.

examples.english: What is your date of birth?
My example date of birth is 1 January 2000.
examples.somali: Taariikhda dhalashada tusaalaha ahi waa 1 Jannaayo 2000.
Diseembar waa bisha laba iyo tobnaad.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.english: What is your example date of birth?
lines.somali: Waa maxay taariikhda dhalashada tusaalaha ahi?

practiceExercises.question: “Date” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Taariikh; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: July is the seventh ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “month” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Date of birth” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Date of birth waxaa loola jeedaa Taariikhda dhalashada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: date / today’s / is / What
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “What is today’s date?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Today is 5 July 2026.
options: Taariikhda dhalashada tusaalaha ahi waa 1 Jannaayo 2000.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Maanta waa Luulyo 5, 2026.
options: My example date of birth is 1 January 2000.
What is your date of birth?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Today is July 5, 2026.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa ah taariikh si sax ah loo qoray?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “5 July 2026” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Sheeg saddex taariikhood oo tusaale ah, hal mar qaabka 5 July 2026, marna July 5, 2026.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Qor 12-ka bilood, kadib qor saddex taariikhood oo male-awaal ah labada qaab.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sheeg saddex taariikhood oo tusaale ah, hal mar qaabka 5 July 2026, marna July 5, 2026.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 12-ka bilood, kadib qor saddex taariikhood oo male-awaal ah labada qaab.
lessons.summarySomali: Taariikhdu waxay leedahay day, month iyo year. 5 July 2026 iyo July 5, 2026 labaduba waa sax; dalalku qaabka way ku kala duwanaan karaan.

quizQuestions.question: “Date” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Taariikh; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: July is the seventh ___.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “month” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Date of birth” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Date of birth waxaa loola jeedaa Taariikhda dhalashada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar fields-ka foom fudud iyo sida xog male-awaal ah loogu buuxiyo English.
learningObjectives: Aqoonso fields-ka foomka.
Kala saar first, last iyo full name.
Buuxi sample form adigoon xog dhab ah isticmaalin.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: First name waa magaca qofka loogu yeero.
Last name waa magaca dambe ee foomka.
Full name wuxuu isku daraa magaca koowaad iyo kan dambe.
Age field-ku wuxuu rabaa tirada sannadaha.
Isticmaal lambar male-awaal ah markaad ku tababaranayso.
Address field-ku wuxuu rabaa meesha tusaalaha ah.
City waa magaalada.
Country waa dalka.
Nationality wuxuu tilmaamaa dalka ama jinsiyadda qofka.
Isticmaal taariikh male-awaal ah layliga.
Occupation waa shaqada qofka.
Employee waa qof u shaqeeya hay’ad ama ganacsi.
Businessperson waa qof ganacsi sameeya.

examples.english: My full name is Amina Noor.
examples.somali: Magacayga oo buuxa waa Aamina Nuur.

practiceExercises.question: “First name” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Magaca koowaad; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: My full ___ is Amina Noor.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “name” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Last name” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Last name waxaa loola jeedaa Magaca dambe/qoyska.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: occupation / is / My / student
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “My occupation is student.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My first name is Amina.
options: Magacayga oo buuxa waa Aamina Nuur.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Magacayga oo buuxa waa Aamina Nuur.
options: My full name is Amina Noor.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: My full name is Amina Noor.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “My full name is Amina Noor.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Foomka “Nationality” maxaa lagu qoraa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Jinsiyadda” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Akhri foom tusaale ah oo leh magac, da’ tusaale, telefoon male-awaal, magaalo, dal iyo occupation.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Buuxi sample form adigoo isticmaalaya qof male-awaal ah; ha qorin xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

lessons.speakingPractice: Akhri foom tusaale ah oo leh magac, da’ tusaale, telefoon male-awaal, magaalo, dal iyo occupation.
lessons.writingPractice: Buuxi sample form adigoo isticmaalaya qof male-awaal ah; ha qorin xogtaada dhabta ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Foomku wuxuu codsan karaa full name, age, phone, address, nationality, date of birth iyo occupation. Xog male-awaal ah ku tababar.

quizQuestions.question: “First name” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Magaca koowaad; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: My full ___ is Amina Noor.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “name” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Last name” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Last name waxaa loola jeedaa Magaca dambe/qoyska.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib u eeg numbers 0–100, age, phone, address, prices, dates iyo personal information forms.
learningObjectives: Isku dar dhammaan xirfadaha Unit 3.
Sax khaladaadka tiro, da’ iyo prepositions.
Buuxi foom iyo wada sheekeysi mixed ah.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Number waa tiro.
Age waa sannadaha qofku jiro.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Read the phone number digit by digit.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Telefoonka digit kasta gooni ayaa loo akhriyaa.
Cinwaan dhab ah looma baahna.
How much ayaa qiime lagu weydiiyaa.
Taariikhdu waxay leedahay maalin, bil iyo sannad.
Foomku wuxuu ururiyaa macluumaad aasaasi ah.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Isticmaal macluumaad qofeed oo male-awaal ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Xog tusaale ah ayaa ammaan u ah practice-ka.

practiceExercises.question: “Number” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Tiro; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

practiceExercises.question: How ___ is this book?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “much” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Age” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Age waxaa loola jeedaa Da’.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: live / Somalia / in / I
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “I live in Somalia.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I am twenty years old.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Lambarkayga tusaalaha ahi waa 000 123 4567.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “My example phone number is 000 123 4567.”.

practiceExercises.question: Xogta tusaalaha ah ayaa lagu isticmaali karaa layliga halkii xogtaada dhabta ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Layliga uma baahna xog gaar ah; xog male-awaal ah ayaa ammaan ah.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa sax u sheegaya da’da?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “I am twenty years old.” ayaa xaaladda ku habboon; xulashooyinka kale waxay bixiyaan tiro ama qaab aan sax ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: Tirso, sheeg da’ tusaale, akhri lambar male-awaal ah, sheeg cinwaan, weydii qiime, kadib sheeg taariikh.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog tusaale ah, si tartiib ahna u sheeg tiro ama jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Samee foom iyo wada sheekeysi isku dara da’, telefoon, cinwaan, qiime iyo taariikh.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi higgaadda tirooyinka, capital letters-ka magacyada iyo calaamadaha jumladda.

practiceExercises.question: 35 sidee loo qoraa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: 35 waa thirty-five, waxaana labada qaybood isku xira hyphen.

practiceExercises.question: I ___ twenty years old.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Da’da English-ka waxaa lagu sheegaa I am…, ma aha I have….

practiceExercises.question: Lambar telefoon sidee badanaa loo akhriyaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Lambarka telefoonka waxaa la akhriyaa digit kasta gooni.

practiceExercises.question: I live ___ Mogadishu.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: In waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo ama dal.

practiceExercises.question: Qiimaha hal buug sidee loo weydiiyaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: How much waxaa lagu weydiiyaa qiimaha.

practiceExercises.question: Bisha 7-aad waa tee?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: July waa bisha toddobaad.

practiceExercises.question: Foomka “occupation” muxuu weydiinayaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Occupation waa shaqada qofka.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel: “Waxaan degganahay Soomaaliya.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Dal waxaa lala isticmaalaa preposition-ka in.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: “It costs ten dollars.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Costs wuxuu tilmaamayaa qiimaha shayga.

practiceExercises.question: Buuxi foom tusaale ah: full name, age, phone, city, country iyo occupation.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal xog male-awaal ah; ha gelin xogtaada gaarka ah haddii aadan rabin.

lessons.speakingPractice: Tirso, sheeg da’ tusaale, akhri lambar male-awaal ah, sheeg cinwaan, weydii qiime, kadib sheeg taariikh.
lessons.writingPractice: Samee foom iyo wada sheekeysi isku dara da’, telefoon, cinwaan, qiime iyo taariikh.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u eegtay tirooyinka, da’da, telefoonka, cinwaanka, qiimaha, taariikhda iyo foomamka. Isticmaal xog tusaale ah si aad ammaan ugu tababarto.

quizQuestions.question: “Number” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa Tiro; xulashooyinka kale waxay la xiriiraan erayo kale oo casharka ku jira.

quizQuestions.question: How ___ is this book?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “much” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid naxwe iyo macne ahaan sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Age” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Age waxaa loola jeedaa Da’.

unitQuiz.question: 13 sidee loo qoraa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: 13 waa thirteen; 30 waa thirty.

unitQuiz.question: 40 sidee loo qoraa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Higgaadda saxda ahi waa forty, ma aha fourty.

unitQuiz.question: Tirada “fifty-seven” waa tee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Fifty waa 50, seven waa 7; wadajir waa 57.

unitQuiz.question: 86 sidee loo qoraa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: 86 waa eighty-six.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa ah 100?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: 100 waa one hundred.

unitQuiz.question: Twenty-one waxaa lagu qoraa hyphen.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Tirooyinka isku dhafan 21–99 waxaa caadi ahaan lagu qoraa hyphen.

unitQuiz.question: I ___ twenty years old.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: I waxaa la socda am; da’da laguma dhaho I have twenty years.

unitQuiz.question: Sidee da’da qofka loo weydiiyaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: How old are you? waa qaabka saxda ah.

unitQuiz.question: He ___ fifteen years old.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: He waxaa la socda is.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa khalad ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: English-ku da’da wuxuu isticmaalaa verb to be: I am twenty.

unitQuiz.question: Lambar telefoon badanaa sidee loo akhriyaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Digit kasta gooni ayaa loo akhriyaa.

unitQuiz.question: “Double zero” waa tee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Double zero waa laba eber oo isku xiga.

unitQuiz.question: Maxaad tiraahdaa marka lambar aan la maqal?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Can you repeat that? wuxuu codsanayaa ku celin.

unitQuiz.question: Oh mararka qaar wuxuu matali karaa zero marka phone number la akhrinayo.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Phone numbers dhexdiisa zero mararka qaar waxaa loo akhriyaa oh.

unitQuiz.question: I live ___ Mogadishu.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: In waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaalo.

unitQuiz.question: I live ___ Peace Road.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: On waxaa lala isticmaalaa magaca waddada.

unitQuiz.question: “District” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: District waa degmo ama qayb maamul.

unitQuiz.question: Qiimaha shay sidee loo weydiiyaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: How much is this? wuxuu weydiiyaa qiimaha.

unitQuiz.question: It ___ ten dollars.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: It waxaa present simple la socda costs.

unitQuiz.question: Cheap lidkiisu waa tee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Cheap waa raqiis; expensive waa qaali.

unitQuiz.question: Bisha 7-aad waa tee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: July waa bisha toddobaad.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa taariikh sax ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Day + month + year waa qaab sax ah.

unitQuiz.question: “Date of birth” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Date of birth waa taariikhda qofku dhashay.

unitQuiz.question: Foomka “occupation” muxuu rabaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Occupation waa shaqada qofka.

unitQuiz.question: Full name waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Full name wuxuu ka kooban yahay magaca qofka oo buuxa.
